description: No scope note or cross-reference to companion skill rossmann-voice, though CLAUDE.md and README.md present the two as an always-paired set
suggested_fix: Add a one-line scope note, e.g. 'For voice/style modeling on top of these rules, see the rossmann-voice skill.'

description: No scope note or cross-reference to companion skill no-ai-slop, though CLAUDE.md and README.md present the two as an always-paired set
suggested_fix: Add a one-line scope note, e.g. 'This voice profile assumes the no-ai-slop banned-word rules are already applied; see that skill first.'

description: The 'Root-cause differentiation' section uses the same heading pattern as the numbered Rule N sections but has no rule number and no matching entry among CLAUDE.md's 24 canonical rules
suggested_fix: Either give it a rule number consistent with CLAUDE.md or relabel it clearly as supplementary guidance, not one of the 24 rules
